diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -96,7 +96,12 @@
                     out += model_out

             out = out / len(models)

             if bias is not None:

-                out = out - bias.to(device).view(1, 2, 1, 1)

+                if isinstance(bias, np.ndarray):

+                    bias = torch.tensor(bias, dtype=torch.float32)

+                bias = bias.to(device)

+                if bias.dim() == 3:

+                    bias = bias.unsqueeze(0)

+                out = out - bias

             out = out * std_t.view(1, 2, 1, 1) + mean_t.view(1, 2, 1, 1)

             preds.append(out.cpu().numpy())
